responses.question_text: What, if anything, would you most like to see improved in body wash or shower gel products?
responses.raw_answer: I want body washes that provide a fresh, long-lasting citrus or ocean scent with a creamy texture that moisturizes without drying my oily, acne-prone skin.
responses.structured_answer: I want body washes that provide a fresh, long-lasting citrus or ocean scent with a creamy texture that moisturizes without drying my oily, acne-prone skin.
responses.reasoning: Profile shows preference for fresh citrus/ocean scents lasting half a day, thick cream texture, and moisturized post-wash feel for oily, acne-prone skin.

responses.question_text: What, if anything, did you find most appealing about the Dove 60-Second Body Spray concept?
responses.raw_answer: The speed and convenience of getting clean in just 60 seconds with proven micellar technology was appealing, especially for busy days when I have little time.
responses.structured_answer: The speed and convenience of getting clean in just 60 seconds with proven micellar technology was appealing, especially for busy days when I have little time.

responses.question_text: What, if anything, would you change or improve about the Dove 60-Second Body Spray concept?
